rationale: Strongest direct codebase precedent for each (IssuePriorityQueue ordering, shipped ll-loop queue compat surface, scratch-pad convention for large output) plus project preference to keep v1 minimal per Scope Boundaries
rule: Serial v1 execution, compat shim for ll-loop run --queue, numeric priority reusing IssuePriorityQueue, hybrid inline/scratch result storage
alternatives_rejected: Bounded ThreadPoolExecutor concurrency (WorkerPool pattern); breaking change to ll-loop run --queue; simple FIFO priority; flat inline result storage
